info.title: GL.iNet Router 4.x API — cloud module
info.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 API exposed at POST /rpc on GL.iNet routers. All methods use JSON-RPC method `call` with params = [sid, module, function, args?]. Auth is a separate challenge/login flow yielding `sid`.

schema.description: server name(serverzone server_name pick one of two)

err_code.description: error code [0: ok; -1: network not reachable]

methods.name: cloud.bind_info
methods.summary: set binding information: Called by the cloud platform, when username is empty, it means unbinding

htmodes.description: the maximum bandwidth supported by each hardware mode, the auto option indicates whether to support automatic bandwidth

src.description: source zone (obtained from the get_zone_list interface)

dest.description: destination zone (obtained from the get_zone_list interface)

src.description: source zone (obtained from the get_zone_list interface)

dest.description: destination zone (obtained from the get_zone_list interface)

enabled.description: whether the main Wi-Fi is enabled

ssid.description: main WiFi SSID(no more than 32 ASCII characters)

encryption.description: main WiFi encryption [none; psk2; psk-mixed; sae; sae-mixed]

hidden.description: whether to hide the main Wi-Fi

guest_enabled.description: whether the guest Wi-Fi is enabled

guest_ssid.description: guest WiFi SSID(no more than 32 ASCII characters)

guest_encryption.description: guest WiFi encryption [none; psk2; psk-mixed; sae; sae-mixed]

guest_hidden.description: whether to hide the guest Wi-Fi

src.description: source zone (obtained from the get_zone_list interface)

dest.description: destination zone (obtained from the get_zone_list interface)

dest.description: destination zone (obtained from the get_zone_list interface)
